input.command:
python3 -c "
import json
# Search Feb 24 articles for key upcoming questions
with open('articles/2026/02/24/articles.jsonl') as f:
    lines = f.readlines()
print(f'Total articles: {len(lines)}')
matches = []
for line in lines:
    a = json.loads(line)
    title = (a.get('title','') or '').lower()
    content = (a.get('content','') or '').lower()[:1500]
    checks = [
        ('barcelona injury', 'barcelona' in title and ('injur' in content or 'hamstring' in content)),
        ('turkish boat', ('turk' in title) and ('boat' in content or 'migrant' in content or 'collision' in content or 'coast' in content)),
        ('university ice', ('columbia' in title or 'harvard' in title or 'mit' in title or 'tufts' in title or 'university' in title) and ('ice' in content[:500] or 'immigration' in content[:500])),
        ('ucl draw', 'champions league' in title and ('draw' in content or 'round of 16' in content or 'last 16' in content)),
        ('gorton denton', 'gorton' in title or ('denton' in title and 'by-election' in content)),
        ('t20 wc', 't20' in title and ('super' in content or 'pakistan' in content[:300] or 'england' in content[:300])),
        ('iran talks', 'iran' in title and ('talk' in content or 'strike' in content or 'nuclear' in content)),
        ('senator pred mkt', 'senator' in title and ('prediction' in content or 'ban' in content or 'betting' in content)),
        ('newcastle', 'newcastle' in title and ('champions' in content or 'draw' in content[:500])),
    ]
    for label, match in checks:
        if match:
            matches.append((label, (a.get('title','') or '')[:120], (a.get('content','') or '')[:200]))
            break
for label, title, content in matches[:20]:
    print(f'[{label}] {title}')
    print(f'  {content[:180]}')
    print()
" 2>/dev/null

Under sustained pressure, ‌the ‌visitors ​struck in the 58th minute when Ole Didrik Blomberg ⁠seized on ​a loose pass ​on the edge of the Inter ‌area and drove at ​goal. Yann Sommer pushed his shot ⁠away but ⁠Jens ​Petter Hauge reacted quickest to convert the
===
Bodo/Glimt spring upset to send Inter crashing out of Champions League
  MILAN, Italy, Feb 24 - Bodo/Glimt dumped last season's finalists Inter Milan out of the Champions League with a remarkable 2-1 win at the San Siro in their playoff second leg on Tuesday that sent the Norwegian minnows through to the last 16 5-2 on aggregate.
Under sustained pressure, the visitors struck in the 58th minute when Ole Didrik Blomberg seized on a loose pass on the edge of the Inter area and drove at goal. Yann Sommer pushed his shot away but Jens Petter Hauge reacted quickest to conv
===
Sorloth hat-trick sends Atletico Madrid into Champions League last 16
  MADRID, Feb 24 - Atletico Madrid striker Alexander Sorloth scored a hat-trick as the Spanish side saw off Belgium’s Club Brugge on Tuesday to win the second leg of their Champions League playoff 4-1 and advance to the last 16 with a 7-4 aggregate triumph.
Johnny Cardoso scored the other goal for the home side while Joel Ordonez netted for Brugge in the 36th minute.
Atletico opened the scoring after Brugge’s Hugo Vetlesen had two good chances blocked in the early stages as the Belgians came out o
===
Newcastle through to last 16 of Champions League 9-3 on aggregate
  NEWCASTLE, England, Feb 24 - Newcastle United took their place in the last 16 of the Champions League for the first time after beating Qarabag 3-2 at St. James' Park on Tuesday for a 9-3 on aggregate win.
The outcome was never in doubt after Newcastle thrashed Qarabag 6-1 in the first leg of the playoff in Baku last week but expectations of a second goal rush proved short-lived after a promising start.
Newcastle were 2-0 up with the fans in full party mode after six minutes, the two goals coming
===
Leverkusen reach Champions League last 16 with 0-0 draw against Olympiacos
  LEVERKUSEN, Germany, Feb 24 - Bayer Leverkusen endured late pressure but earned a 0-0 draw with visitors Olympiacos Piraeus on Tuesday to book their Champions League last-16 spot with a 2-0 aggregate win in their knockout playoff.
Leverkusen, who had won last week's first leg in Greece 2-0 thanks to Patrik Schick's double, will now face either German rivals Bayern Munich or Arsenal in the round of 16 next month. The draw will take place on Friday.
